title: deguelia spruceana
intro: Deguelia spruceana, also known as the "Guayacanillo" or "Milk tree", is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Deguelia spruceana include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Deguelia spruceana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
